content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	generator client {2	  provider = "prisma-client-js"3	}4	5	datasource db {6	  provider = "sqlite"7	  url      = "file:./dev.db"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER")16	  restaurants   Restaurant[]17	  orders        Order[]18	}19	20	model Restaurant {21	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())22	  name        String23	  description String?24	  address     String?25	  ownerId     String26	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])27	  menuItems   MenuItem[]28	  orders      Order[]29	}30	31	model MenuItem {32	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())33	  name         String34	  description  String?35	  price        Float36	  restaurantId String37	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])38	  orderItems   OrderItem[]39	}40	41	model Order {42	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())43	  status       String      @default("PENDING")44	  total        Float45	  userId       String46	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])47	  restaurantId String48	  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])49	  items        OrderItem[]50	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())51	}52	53	model OrderItem {54	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())55	  quantity   Int56	  orderId    String57	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])58	  menuItemId String59	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])60	}
